items.title: 'It's like a decaying body': Australian farmers battle mouse plague
items.dek: Farmers report thousands of mice per hectare destroying crops and invading homes.
items.body: Farmers report thousands of mice per hectare destroying crops and invading homes.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ecuador accused of meddling in Colombian election with tariff vow
items.dek: Ecuadorian leader Daniel Noboa offers to cancel tariffs after speaking to a right-wing presidential candidate ahead of Sunday's vote.
items.body: Ecuadorian leader Daniel Noboa offers to cancel tariffs after speaking to a right-wing presidential candidate ahead of Sunday's vote.
